name: Miisaanka AVPU
description: Qiimaynta miyir-qabka ee 4-heer degdeg ah. Ka dhaqso badan GCS kala soocidda hore.
instructions: Qiimee heerka ugu sarreeya ee jawaabta uu bukaanku muujiyo.

scoring.label: Digniin
scoring.description: Bukaanku waa soo jeedaa, ogsoon, oo si caadi ah ugu jawaabay

scoring.label: Codka
scoring.description: Bukaanku waxa uu ka jawaabaa kicinta afka kaliya

scoring.label: Xanuun
scoring.description: Bukaanku wuxuu ka jawaabaa kaliya kicinta xanuunka leh (sternal xoqid, cadaadiska sariirta cidiyaha)

scoring.label: Aan laga jawaabin
scoring.description: Wax jawaab ah looma hayo wax kicinaya -- faragelin dariiq-haweed degdeg ah ayaa loo baahan yahay

interpretation.triage: Halis ah -- hawo mareen halis ah, GCS caadi ahaan <= 8
